query:
-- Atualizar vendas de test_company para B I IMOVEIS LTDA
UPDATE sales 
SET companyId = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name LIKE '%B I IMOVEIS%' LIMIT 1)
WHERE companyId = 'test_company';

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT companyId, COUNT(*) as total 
FROM sales 
WHERE companyId = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name LIKE '%B I IMOVEIS%' LIMIT 1);
